variants: Arvid Thoren has established himself as a prominent expert in Actuarial Science through his influential work, Signal Anchor Theory, which provides novel insights into assessing risk. In addition to his scholarly contributions, Arvid is a dedicated member of the Raindrop Choralists, where he enjoys connecting with others through music.
